description: This pair of Bio STR canvas shoes from adidas is lightweight and comfortable for the feet. In a cool black and white colour combination, it's a great addition to your casual wardrobe. Wear this with your favourite tee and denims. Upper Canvas upper for durability, comfort, breathability and easy maintenance Fabric overlay on sides of the midfoot to represent adidas patented 3-Stripe and for enhanced midfoot support Long tongue for comfort Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Durable PU toe box and foxing Brand badge appliqué d on the tongue Padded sockliner for all-day comfort Midsole PU midsole for durability and cushioning Outsole Durable rubber outsole with herringbone pattern lugs for maximum traction and grip shoe care Wipe dirt off with a moist cloth To remove tough stains, make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
